title: Slack get_conversation_history
description: Read message history from a channel or DM. Results are newest-first; when the result's has_more is true, fetch older messages by calling again with latest set to the oldest returned ts.

channel.description: Conversation ID (C... for a channel, D... for a DM).

limit.description: Maximum messages to return (default 50, max 999 — Slack rejects 1000).

latest.description: Only return messages before this timestamp. For older pages, pass the oldest returned ts.

oldest.description: Only return messages after this timestamp.
